subject: [CPS] Adding CPS Healthcheck Test
commit_message:
[CPS] Adding CPS Healthcheck Test

Adding one test for CPS Healthcheck.

Issue-ID: CPS-840
Change-Id: I90974872d36105fe764eaa41371c126e616c5fce
Signed-off-by: Nagendra90287 <nagendrakumar.pal@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 2: Commit message was updated.

Patch Set 2:

Please review this MR

Patch Set 2:

there are already CPS healthcheck tests...
It is directly managed at CPS level, which is now the recommendation as this healthcheck can be used for real CIST, gating, ..

https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_master/2022-01/13_03-29/xtesting-healthcheck/cps-healthcheck/cps-healthcheck/report.html

what is new here?

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> there are already CPS healthcheck tests...
> It is directly managed at CPS level, which is now the recommendation as this healthcheck can be used for real CIST, gating, ..
> 
> https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/daily/onap_daily_pod4_master/2022-01/13_03-29/xtesting-healthcheck/cps-healthcheck/cps-healthcheck/report.html
> 
> what is new here?

In Above daily pipeline liveliness and readiness checks are being run. However the health check I am trying to implement will check for overall component status to be UP. It will check for Database and diskspace status along with liveliness and readiness check. Example of response is below:

GET Response : url=http://cps.fra-preprod:8081/manage/health 
 status=200, reason=OK 
 headers={'Date': 'Fri, 17 Dec 2021 08:24:07 GMT', 'Set-Cookie': 'JSESSIONID=node019m5x87edmaoj1uik3qfr93jjz1513.node0; Path=/', 'Expires': 'Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'application/vnd.spring-boot.actuator.v3+json', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff', 'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block', 'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked'} 
 body={"status":"UP","components":{"db":{"status":"UP","details":{"database":"PostgreSQL","validationQuery":"isValid()"}},"discoveryComposite":{"description":"Discovery Client not initialized","status":"UNKNOWN","components":{"discoveryClient":{"description":"Discovery Client not initialized","status":"UNKNOWN"}}},"diskSpace":{"status":"UP","details":{"total":270430900224,"free":181344980992,"threshold":10485760,"exists":true}},"livenessState":{"status":"UP"},"ping":{"status":"UP"},"readinessState":{"status":"UP"},"refreshScope":{"status":"UP"}},"groups":["liveness","readiness"]}

Patch Set 2:

(1 comment)

I see
I think it would make more sense to keep all the CPS related tests in CPS => https://github.com/onap/cps/tree/master/csit/tests
and not use testsuite anymore

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

looks good to me, just wondering this is what we call 'cps-core' the have a related (sub)project, cps-temporal that has its own lifecycle and healthcheck, should that be added here too?

you can see our own CSIT equivalent tests here: https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=cps/cps-temporal.git;a=tree;f=csit/tests/actuator;h=4cbf7adb64d4f91c7bdf7b95896c2db63150758c;hb=refs/heads/master
